title: Ral (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ral''' may refer to:

*'''[[Ral (creature)|Ral]]''', a flying creature from [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] also known as a stone ray.
*'''[[Ral (person)|Ral]]''', a counselor to the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]].
*'''[[Ral Shawgrim]]''', a turn-coat Rebel technician.

'''Ral''' also appeared as an element in [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] male names, where it meant laughter or humor. It was also a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] surname, translating to "family friend."

==Sources==
*''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' {{C|for Bothan and Cerean names}}
